+---------------------+
|  [  Processing  ]   |
|  +-----------+      |
|  |  Execute  |      |
|  +-----------+      |
|        ^            |
|        |            |
|   +----+----+       |
|   |  Parse  |       |
|   +---------+       |
+--------^------------+
         |
+--------+---------------+
|  [  Authentication  ]  |
| +------+-----+         |
| |  Validate  |         |
| +------------+         |
|        ^               |
|        |               |
|   +----+----+          |
|   |  Login  |          |
|   +---------+          |
+------------------------+
